goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what conversions are supported
List units in the speed category to understand film projection speed options
Convert film projection speed from feet per minute to meters per minute
Convert a film reel diameter from inches to centimeters for inventory purposes

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and hands-on, focused on maintaining vintage film equipment. Prefers clear, direct information without unnecessary jargon.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about film projection, film reels, and projector maintenance. Does not know specific tool names or APIs for unit conversion. Understands basic measurements but may need to convert between imperial and metric systems for international film equipment.

end_condition: The user has explored available categories, identified relevant units for film projection work, and completed the needed unit conversions for projection speed and film reel measurements.
